response.global_analysis: The video is a promotional announcement segment from a 3D live broadcast. It begins with on-screen text screens detailing a collaboration, followed by high-energy dialogue from the members of Secret Society holoX (Lui, La+, Koyori, Iroha). They announce a collaboration with the 'Monogatari Series' and the release of their first album, 'Secret ORDER'. I have transcribed the on-screen text and the spoken dialogue, ensuring translations reflect the excitement and the specific project details mentioned. Timing is tied to the appearance of text and the vocal outbursts.

subtitles.original: 其ノ怪シイ集団ハ、
subtitles.english: That mysterious group is...

subtitles.original: 偶像 ―― “アキドル” ナノダト云フ。
subtitles.english: They say they are idols -- "Akidols".

subtitles.original: ソシテ ――
subtitles.english: And then --

subtitles.original: 正確ナ話ヲスルト、征服ショウトシテイルノハ
subtitles.english: To be precise, what they are trying to conquer

subtitles.original: エデンノ星ラシイ。
subtitles.english: is apparently the Planet Eden.

subtitles.original: タダ、ドイウコトカ、
subtitles.english: However, for some reason,

subtitles.original: 交ハルハズノナキ世界ガ、
subtitles.english: the worlds that were never meant to cross,

subtitles.original: 今回バカリハ 油断シテシマッタラシイ。
subtitles.english: just for this once, seem to have let their guard down.

subtitles.original: 交
subtitles.english: Cross

subtitles.original: 特別話 / 秘密結社holoX × 物語シリーズ 其ノ零
subtitles.english: Special Story / Secret Society holoX x Monogatari Series Part 0

subtitles.original: 〈物語〉シリーズ × holoX コラボ開催決定
subtitles.english: Monogatari Series x holoX Collaboration Confirmed

subtitles.original: うわあああ！うそでしょ？！マジで？！
subtitles.english: Whaaaa?! No way! Seriously?!

subtitles.original: え、まずい、やばい！いいの？！
subtitles.english: Wait, this is bad, this is crazy! Is this okay?!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ大好きじゃんね！好き！やばすぎ！
subtitles.english: We love it so much! I love it! This is too crazy!

subtitles.original: どういうこと？！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: What does this mean?! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: まじで？！怒られない我が輩？！
subtitles.english: Seriously?! Will I not get scolded?!

subtitles.original: 怒られないよ！台本読んでないこと怒られるよ！
subtitles.english: You won't! You'll get scolded for not reading the script!

subtitles.original: 物語シリーズとのコラボが決定しちゃいました！
subtitles.english: The Monogatari Series collaboration has been decided!

subtitles.original: どういうこと？！詳細は随時発表されるようです！
subtitles.english: What is going on?! Details will be announced periodically!

subtitles.original: お楽しみに！我々も分かっていない！
subtitles.english: Look forward to it! Even we don't know!

subtitles.original: え、どういうことですか？！
subtitles.english: Eh, what does this mean?!

subtitles.original: ちょっとうち等も焦ってるんですけど、最後に一つ！
subtitles.english: We're a bit panicked, but there's one more thing!

subtitles.original: もう一つ見ないといけないんで！一旦落ち着いて！
subtitles.english: We have one more to see! Calm down for a second!

subtitles.original: 皆、この六つ目が何か、コメントで教えて！
subtitles.english: Everyone, tell us in the comments what this sixth one is!

subtitles.original: 何かな？予想してみて！
subtitles.english: What is it? Try to guess!

subtitles.original: 忍ちゃんコラボじゃないかな？！
subtitles.english: Maybe a Shinobu-chan collaboration?!

subtitles.original: 最後の一つは何だと思いますか？
subtitles.english: What do you think the last one is?

subtitles.original: ヒントを言うと、今年二曲作りましたよね？
subtitles.english: To give you a hint, we made two songs this year, right?

subtitles.original: 全部でholoXって何曲ありますか？
subtitles.english: How many songs does holoX have in total?

subtitles.original: 何曲だっけ？えーと...
subtitles.english: How many was it? Let's see...

subtitles.original: たくさん！覚えてないのか？！
subtitles.english: A lot! You don't remember?!

subtitles.original: 企画を除いて、全部で七曲あります！
subtitles.english: Excluding projects, there are seven songs in total!

subtitles.original: 七曲！すごいね！
subtitles.english: Seven songs! That's amazing!

subtitles.original: ってことは？！皆分かってきたんじゃない？！
subtitles.english: Which means...?! Everyone is starting to realize, right?!

subtitles.original: 気づいてる人もいるみたいなので、六枚目オープン！
subtitles.english: It looks like some have noticed, so open the sixth card!

subtitles.original: バン！ジャジャン！
subtitles.english: Bam! Ta-da!

subtitles.original: なんと！ファーストアルバムが出ます！
subtitles.english: What! Our first album is coming out!

subtitles.original: やったー！嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Yay! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: ファーストアルバム「Secret ORDER」！
subtitles.english: First Album: "Secret ORDER"!

subtitles.original: 混ざった、混ざった！Secret ORDERだよ！
subtitles.english: I mixed it up! It's Secret ORDER!

subtitles.original: holoXでの四年間をギュッと詰め込んだアルバムです！
subtitles.english: It's an album packed with our four years in holoX!

subtitles.original: 「常夜リペイント」も新録アレンジ版を収録！
subtitles.english: Includes a newly recorded arrangement of "Jouyari Paint"!

subtitles.original: さらになんと未発表の楽曲も！
subtitles.english: And what's more, there are unreleased tracks too!
Wait, 8, 9, 10, 11?! That's so many!

subtitles.original: 通常盤なんですけど、上が見えない！早い！
subtitles.english: Regarding the standard edition... I can't see the top! Too fast!

subtitles.original: 通常盤には初回限定特典があります！
subtitles.english: The standard edition has a first-press limited bonus!

subtitles.original: 各メンバーのソロVer.ジャケットがランダムで封入！
subtitles.english: Solo jackets for each member included at random!

subtitles.original: 四枚並べると一枚絵になるとのことですよ！
subtitles.english: If you line up all four, they form a single picture!

subtitles.original: ラプちゃんの角が刀の上に乗ってる！本当だ！
subtitles.english: La+-chan's horn is on top of the sword! It's true!

subtitles.original: これは並べないといけないね！
subtitles.english: We definitely have to line them up!

subtitles.original: 完全生産限定盤の特典は...
subtitles.english: The bonus for the Limited Complete Edition is...

subtitles.original: holoXらしい秘密の仕掛けが！秘密の仕掛け？！
subtitles.english: a secret gimmick that fits holoX! A secret gimmick?!

subtitles.original: 我々も分かってない！この後22時から販売開始です！
subtitles.english: Even we don't know! Sales start tonight at 22:00!

subtitles.original: ぜひご予約お願いいたします！
subtitles.english: Please make sure to pre-order!

subtitles.original: 告知盛りだくさんでしたね！告知カードはお役御免！
subtitles.english: That was a lot of announcements! The cards are retiring now!

subtitles.original: バイバーイ！消せるのこれ？！こよー！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye! Can you make these disappear?! Koyo!

subtitles.original: ここに予算かけすぎだろ！仕掛けやばい！
subtitles.english: They spent too much budget on this! This gimmick is crazy!

subtitles.original: holoXの力ってすげーんだから！
subtitles.english: The power of holoX is incredible!

subtitles.original: ライブもラストスパートでございます！
subtitles.english: The live is now in its final stretch!

subtitles.original: この後、何やらお楽しみ、サプライズがあるようです！
subtitles.english: After this, it seems there's something to enjoy, a surprise!

subtitles.original: 最後までチャンネルはそのままでお願いします！
subtitles.english: Please stay tuned until the very end!

subtitles.original: 行くぞ皆！最後まで楽しんで！行くぞー！
subtitles.english: Let's go, everyone! Enjoy until the end! Let's go!
